description: Source-located Huyền Khí candidate-rule seed and expert-review work queue.
safetyBoundary: No candidate rule is loaded by the canonical ontology as effective knowledge.
No evaluator, score, numeric coefficient, runtime analyzer, prediction prose, or UI change is included.
Searchable transcription evidence must be cross-checked against a physical witness before doctrinal promotion.
Expert approval is derived from the append-only review ledger and cannot be stored by hand.
No school fallback or fabricated source/claim identifier is permitted.
